timestamp_basis: investigative review of logs and alarm screenshots referencing prior-night events
event_summary: Investigation tied the prior-night GLD1 and tipper alarm window to ethernet and OPC UA communication faults, including connection reset on 10.27.80.248 and alarms for RIO Module Ethernet Failure, ClearLink not communicating, VFDs not detected, and IO Link Master not detected.
action_taken: Reviewed Ignition logs and visual alarm history to correlate communication faults with the incident pattern.
outcome: Investigation produced candidate evidence of communication instability but not a validated root cause for case 229488.

actor: Wesley Saunders / Mitchel Flynn / Todd Fuchs
event_summary: Later-day investigation captured connection reset on OP station 3 (.156), keep-alive failures, subscription transfer failures, tipper comms issues, and heartbeat recovery evidence; the team discussed network degradation as a best guess and noted a manual Ignition reset reestablished heartbeats and captured new logs.
action_taken: Collected additional diagnostics, manually reset Ignition for observation, and reviewed heartbeat and OPC UA status screens.
outcome: Heartbeat and connection recovery were observed, but the underlying cause remained a candidate hypothesis.

outcome: Active remote troubleshooting began.

missing_fields: exact time when lines stopped
extraction_notes: OCR 'avgs' normalized to AGVs in event summary.
event_summary: L2 documented that the sort had just started, then all three lines stopped as AGVs lined up to go to tippers; hospital tote removal failed to execute; all tippers showed heartbeat timeout while active and enabled; no RMS faults were visible.
action_taken: L2 summarized the observed failure pattern after connecting to the site.
outcome: Incident signature aligned with prior heartbeat/service failure pattern.

source_section: Teams Chat Data / Haslet Support Chat
missing_fields: explicit heartbeat values
whether heartbeat returned before restart
extraction_notes: Heartbeat screenshots are noisy OCR; promoted only as diagnostic review evidence.
event_summary: Support discussed whether services should be reset, checked whether heartbeat statistics had returned, and reviewed heartbeat-related visual data.
action_taken: Engineer guidance requested heartbeat verification before or during recovery planning.
outcome: Recovery path focused on service restart rather than Ignition OPC restart.

action_taken: Recovery instructions were issued and Optisweep was confirmed as the service to restart.
outcome: Clear recovery plan established for execution.

missing_fields: exact time of service restart completion
extraction_notes: Hospital recovery includes a separate log out/in action in addition to service restart.
event_summary: After recovery actions, AGVs were moving again; hospital tote removal recovered after a hospital log out/in; the system was reported operational and the call was disengaged.
action_taken: L2 validated AGV movement and hospital function, including a hospital log out/in to restore tote removal.
outcome: Operational recovery was confirmed during the live support session.

extraction_notes: This event consolidates the explicit Salesforce resolution note and status change.
actor: Justin McCalmont / Gianny D Perez Rocha
event_summary: Salesforce was updated that the system had been E-stopped and the Optisweep service restarted, Antonio confirmed proper AGV and hospital operation, logs were downloaded, switch log follow-up was assigned, and the case status moved to Resolved.
action_taken: Support documented recovery details and changed case status to Resolved.
outcome: Incident moved from escalated state to resolved state.

source_section: Teams Chat Data / Haslet Support Chat; Salesforce Case Data

extraction_notes: Combines post-resolution log note with final closure because both are end-of-incident administrative actions.
actor: Justin McCalmont / Gianny D Perez Rocha
event_summary: Ignition and Windows event logs were saved to the RDP desktop, DB log transfer remained unclear, and the case was later closed in Salesforce.
action_taken: Post-resolution evidence was retained and the case was administratively closed.
outcome: Incident documentation completed, with an open gap around DB log handling.
